text:
is a woman who lived in Shiganshina District before the Fall of Wall Maria.

Appearance

She is a woman of average height with long blonde hair that she keeps tied back. She is only seen wearing a light-colored tunic.

Story

Prologue arc

After the Survey Corps returns from an expedition outside Wall Maria, Moses' mother rushes to the survivors searching for her son Moses. Upon approaching the commander, Keith Shadis, she is given all that is left of her son: a single arm. Breaking down in despair, she begs Keith to tell her that her son's sacrifice will ultimately help save humanity, but Keith, breaking down himself, tearfully admits that Moses' sacrifice was for nothing.
